overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game (Starfield) showing a character in spacesuit armor exploring the interior of a spacecraft or space station. The character moves through connected rooms including an office area, a red-lit corridor with posters, a server room with a viewport to space, and a lounge area with industrial decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: small office workspace with desk and chairs

events.description: character approaches doorway leading to red-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through a compact office space toward an exit doorway

entered.detail: white rectangular desk with clean surface and metallic legs
white ergonomic office chair with wheels
green plastic storage bin on the floor
tall metal shelving unit with multiple tiers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a small office room with white furniture and artificial lighting. The character in spacesuit armor walks forward past a desk and chair toward a doorway, preparing to exit the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with emergency red lighting and wall posters

events.description: environment shifts to red emergency lighting as character enters corridor
moving from office into narrow corridor with industrial elements

agents.ego_description: character proceeds through a narrow corridor illuminated by red emergency lights, passing wall posters and a metal ladder

entered.detail: vertical metal ladder attached to wall leading to upper level
multiple framed posters and notices on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. The walls are adorned with posters and a metal ladder leads upward. The character continues walking forward along the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: server room with viewport showing starfield outside

events.description: character approaches viewport window revealing stars and space outside

agents.ego_description: character walks past a viewport showing the starfield outside and continues along tall server racks

entered.detail: large rectangular window showing black space with distant stars
tall black server racks with blinking indicator lights
computer terminal with screen and keyboard on a stand

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a technical room featuring a viewport revealing the darkness of space with stars. Tall server racks line the wall as the character walks past them toward another doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge area with seating and industrial ceiling fixtures

events.description: entering lounge area from server room through doorway
lighting shifts from red to warmer, more neutral artificial light

agents.ego_description: character enters a lounge area with a leather couch and industrial decor, then pauses to observe the space

entered.detail: dark leather couch against the far wall
exposed metal pipes and conduits running across the ceiling
circular ventilation fan mounted on the wall
metal work desk with equipment on surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a final lounge area with warmer lighting, featuring a leather couch and exposed industrial piping on the ceiling. The space appears to be a living quarters or common room, and the character stops to survey the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a spacecraft's interior, transitioning from a sterile office into a series of technical and living quarters. It begins in a small office with white furniture and artificial lighting as the character in spacesuit armor walks past a desk toward an exit. As the character steps through the doorway, the environment shifts abruptly into a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting and lined with posters. The scene then opens into a technical room where tall server racks flank a viewport revealing the starry darkness of space, before the camera follows the character through another doorway. Finally, the lighting warms as the character enters a lounge area featuring a leather couch and exposed industrial piping, where they come to a stop to survey the room.
